rules.rule: A foundation service must depend only on brokers, models, and approved same-layer dependencies.
A foundation service must not import React, useState, useEffect, or any React hook.
A foundation service must not return JSX or contain JSX expressions.
A foundation service must validate all inputs before calling a broker.
A foundation service must catch broker exceptions and re-throw as domain-specific exceptions with meaningful context.
A foundation service must not perform page navigation.
A foundation service must not own React state.
